§6Encoded Pattern§f:
The §6Encoded Pattern §f(appliedenergistics2:encoded_pattern) is a §6crafting recipe §f encoded into an item. It is the §6fundamental data item §f of the AE2 §6autocrafting §f system — without patterns, the network cannot perform any §6automated crafting §f jobs.

§6Production Path (ItemEncodedPattern.java:51-206)§f:
The §6Encoded Pattern §f has §cno crafting recipe §f (recipe_count=0 in jei-graph). It is produced §6interactively §f by the §6Pattern Terminal §f (see §6ME Pattern Terminal §f quest):
- §eStep 1§f: place a §6Blank Pattern §f in the §6Pattern Terminal §f crafting slot
- §eStep 2§f: place the §6output item §f in the §6result slot §f
- §eStep 3§f: place the §6input ingredients §f in the §63×3 §f crafting grid
- §eStep 4§f: the §6Pattern Terminal §f encodes the recipe into the §6Blank Pattern §f, producing an §6Encoded Pattern §f

§6Function§f:
- §bCrafting recipe data §f: the Encoded Pattern stores §6inputs §f, §6outputs §f, and §6crafting rules §f
- §bPattern Terminal §f: read by a §6Pattern Terminal §f to determine what to craft
- §bClearing §f: sneak-right-click an Encoded Pattern to §6clear §f it back to a §6Blank Pattern §f (ItemEncodedPattern.java:73-94)
- §bPattern types §f: §6crafting §f (3×3 grid), §6processing §f (machine interface), §6stonecutting §f variants
- §bStorage §f: the Encoded Pattern is a §6data item §f — it can be stored in §6ME Storage Cells §f, §6Pattern Providers §f, or §6Molecular Assemblers §f

§6Direct Descendants (TaskRetrieval graph)§f:
The jei-graph shows 0 items the Encoded Pattern is a component of, but it is referenced in 980 §6use sites §f across the mod pack. Common uses:
- §bAutocrafting §f: every §6autocrafting job §f requires an Encoded Pattern
- §bPattern Provider §f: stores Encoded Patterns for §6parallel §f processing
- §bMolecular Assembler §f: the §6endpoint §f that executes the pattern

§6Practical Use§f:
- §eTip§f: build a §6Pattern Terminal §f as soon as you have an §6ME Pattern Provider §f or §6ME Interface §f
- §eTip§f: keep a §6Blank Pattern §f in a §6ME Chest §f for §bon-demand §f pattern creation
- §eTip§f: use §6sub-networks §f of patterns to organize §6crafting hierarchies §f
- §cWarning§f: a §6Blank Pattern §f costs §b3 §fIron Ingots + §b1 §fCalculation Processor + §b1 §fCertus Quartz Crystal — see §6ME Pattern Terminal §f quest for the full recipe
- §cWarning§f: an Encoded Pattern with a §6broken recipe §f (e.g. ingredients removed from the modpack) will §6fail §f and show as a §cred §f pattern in the §6Pattern Terminal §f
